title: Wood Totem Cross
description: Replaces totem with a wood cross
body:
Check out the Wood Totem Cross Resource Pack for Minecraft! It swaps the old Totem of Undying for a fresh Wood Cross, enhancing your adventure. Get the pack now for a whole new Minecraft journey!

![Cross](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb3f5c603c432da10524d7eee8fd810eead3c220.png)
